case_title: EDWARDS, RONNIE E et al VS KEN'S KITCHEN

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-02-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, CAROLYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEN'S KITCHEN $250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $250.00, THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT KEN'S KITCHEN AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF RONNIE EDWARDS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. F. RAYRAY, CLERK; COMM PAUL SLAVIT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY EDWARDS, RONNIE E JOHNSON, CAROLYN AS TO DEFENDANT KEN'S KITCHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-02-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-02-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-27-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KEN'S KITCHEN
